parameters.subject: Welcome to ProLnk, {{ $json.partnerName }}! 🎉
parameters.message:
=

You're in, {{ $json.partnerName }}!

Your ProLnk partner account is approved and ready. Here's how to get your first lead in the next 24 hours:

  1. Complete your profile — add your service area and business type
  2. Download Field OS — log your first job from the field
  3. Log a job — upload photos and let AI find opportunities for you
Go to Your Dashboard →

Your referral code: {{ $json.referralCode }} — share it to earn bonus commissions.

parameters.subject: =Quick tip: How {{ $json.partnerName }} can earn their first commission
parameters.message:
=

The fastest path to your first commission

Partners who log a job with photos in their first 7 days earn their first commission 3x faster. Here's the exact flow:

  1. Open Field OS on your phone
  2. Tap the camera button after completing a job
  3. Upload 2-3 photos of the property
  4. AI scans for opportunities and routes them to matching partners
  5. When a partner closes the job — you earn a commission
Open Field OS →

parameters.subject: Week 1 check-in — how's it going?
parameters.message:
=

One week in — let's see where you stand

Check your dashboard to see your current stats, any pending leads, and your tier progress.

If you haven't logged your first job yet, now is the time — the network is most active on weekdays between 8am-6pm.

View My Dashboard →

_meta.description: 3-email welcome sequence: Day 0 (welcome + portal link), Day 1 (first job tip), Day 7 (check-in). Fires on partner approval. Payload: { partnerEmail, partnerName, referralCode }
_meta.setup: 1. Set Resend env vars. 2. Set webhook URL in ProLnk admin → Webhooks → Partner Approved. 3. Activate.
